briefdescription.para: Shift value to get higher 32 bit address.
This function sends IPI request to provides Get device id.

parameterdescription.para: used to store the Id code register values.

inbodydescription.para: Send request to PLM using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to Get board.

parameterdescription.para: Address where PLM has to copy the board details
Max size available at destination for PLM to copy in words
Length of board data that PLM copied

inbodydescription.para: Send request to PLM using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to Tamper Trigger.

parameterdescription.para: To select the valid tamper response

listitem.para: Handoff to the Rom on success.

inbodydescription.para: Send request to PLM using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (XPlmi_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u32 sub_cmd, u64 Arg, u32 Len)
memberdef.name: XPlmi_EventLogging

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to Event Logging.

parameterdescription.para: Arguments to be passed for the sub command, for all sub commands Arg holds Address, whereas uart sub command Arg holds Arg1, Arg2 in upper and lower 32bit respectively

inbodydescription.para: Performs input parameters validation. Return error code if input parameters are invalid
Fill IPI Payload based on sub command
Send request to PLM using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to configure secure communication.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to structure which contains SLR index, IV1, IV2 and key

inbodydescription.para: Send request to PLM using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to get secure communication status.

parameterdescription.para: SLR number for which secure communication establishment status is needed
Pointer to variable to which secure communication status is to be written

inbodydescription.para: Send request to PLM using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to set DDRMC main registers status command.

inbodydescription.para: Send request to PLM using generic API

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to instance XPlmi_ClientInstance

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS - On valid input SlrIndex.
XST_FAILURE - On non valid input SlrIndex

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 dd 01/09/24 Initial release pre 07/10/24 Added support for configure secure communication command and also added SSIT support pre 09/30/24 Added XPlmi_GetSecureCommStatus API pre 10/19/24 Fixed compilation warning pre 01/13/25 Added command to set access status of DDRMC main registers obs 03/17/25 Fixed GCC warnings 2.00 sk 01/23/26 Updated event logging for all sub commands 2.4 gnr 03/18/26 Updated the Payload assignments with XPLMI_PACK_PAYLOAD macros tbk 02/24/26 Added SMC support for client applications tbk 05/19/26 Unified response indexing; helper now handles SMC/mailbox shift
